bookmarks.title: walkinglabs/awesome-harness-engineering: 🛠️ Awesome tools & guides for harness engineering.
bookmarks.note: 最近 harness 很火，这个仓库开源了 awesome-harness-engineering。具体整理了一些关于 AI agent harness engineering 的资源，包括架构约束、反馈回路、运行时 scaffolding等，都是专门给团队做长期、生产级 agent 用的。涉及到定义、操作原则、评测和观测、参考实现等等。
bookmarks.excerpt: 🛠️ Awesome tools & guides for harness engineering. - walkinglabs/awesome-harness-engineering
